candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above EBIT, but it is not labelled as being in cost of sales/raw materials and services. Relative to the selected COGS bucket 'Raw materials and services', this does not clearly appear to be COGS-specific.
Component of the D&A summary line. Not COGS-specific, and should not be chosen over the summary if a summary is used.
Component of the D&A summary line and appears more consistent with overhead/admin than COGS. Do not use if the summary row is available.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-tagged depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible D&A appears as a separate operating line at the statement level, but there is insufficient evidence that it belongs to the selected COGS bucket rather than overhead. Conservative choice is to not add any COGS_DA separately.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line at the same level as other operating expense buckets and outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows ('Staf expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'). Since no SG&A total row was selected, this separate line appears to sit alongside those components and should be added separately if assigning operating overhead D&A.
Component of the D&A summary row. Use only if the summary row were absent; otherwise exclude to avoid double counting.
Component of the D&A summary row and likely overhead-related, but should not be selected when the summary 'Depreciation & Amortization' row exists.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists only of 'Staf expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'. 'Depreciation & Amortization' is presented as a separate same-level operating line above EBIT, so it does not appear embedded in those selected rows. The summary row is preferred over its components to avoid double counting.
